Home / Words

1,000 Most Common Spanish Words

Ranked by real-world frequency. Learn the top 1,000 and you'll understand ~74% of everyday spoken Spanish. Filter by part of speech, search, hide translations to test yourself, and mark words as learned.

991aplicarto applyverb
992jugarto play (game/sport)verb
993actuarto act, to performverb
994generarto generateverb

999separarto separateverb
1000combinarto combineverb

Want to know what % you actually know?

Take the 2-minute Word Reach test to find out.

Test Your Level

FAQ

How many Spanish words do I need to be conversational?expand_more

Around 1,000 of the most frequent words covers ~74% of everyday spoken Spanish. With 1,500 you reach roughly 80% — enough to follow most conversations and shows.

Where does this frequency list come from?expand_more

The list is compiled from large Spanish-language corpora — primarily TV/film subtitles and spoken-language sources — to reflect what real speakers actually say.

Is this list free?expand_more

Yes — the full 1,000-word list is free to read, search, filter, and mark as learned. No signup required.

What's the difference between this and Duolingo?expand_more

Duolingo teaches words in a fixed lesson order, mixing useful and obscure vocabulary. This list is ranked purely by frequency, so every word you learn pulls real-world comprehension up.

Most Common Spanish

© 2026 Most Common Spanish. Master the 1,500 words that unlock real-world Spanish.
